heading: Succession of Federal Home Loan Banks
label: 1445 Succession of Federal Home Loan Banks
text: Each Federal Home Loan Bank shall have succession until dissolved by the Director under this chapter or by further act of Congress.
notes: Amendments2008— substituted “the Director” for “the Board”.Pub. L. 110–2891989— substituted “Board” for “board”.Pub. L. 101–73
amendments: Amendments2008— substituted “the Director” for “the Board”.Pub. L. 110–2891989— substituted “Board” for “board”.Pub. L. 101–73
